projectDescription: Personal portfolio website for Gökhan Bulut, a TypeScript developer, built with Next.js 15 and Tailwind CSS, featuring a blog, projects showcase, and live Discord status via lantern.rest.
keyFeatures: Personal portfolio with bio, projects showcase, and work history
Blog system powered by MDX for rich content authoring
Live Discord online/offline status via lantern.rest API
Spotify listening status display when active
Rybbit analytics integration with custom event tracking
Light/dark mode support based on OS preference
View transitions for smooth page navigation
Inline tooltips for contextual definitions and links
